[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../index.md) / testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility

# ~~testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility~~

> **Test Support Layer**

JSON parsing and validation utilities for [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) entities
in test assertions.

## Deprecated

All exports in this module are deprecated.  The
Effect-TS migration validates coffee responses directly via
[Schema.decodeUnknownSync](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) in individual test files or
through service-level `executeFormatted` assertions.  Will be
removed in a future cleanup pass.

## Remarks

Uses [CoffeeSchema](../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md) from the coffee domain to decode and
validate unknown values at runtime.  Two non-exported decoders
([decodeCoffee](#), [decodeCoffeeArray](#)) power the
public parsing functions.

## Functions

| Function                                                      | Description                                                                                                                               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [~~isCoffee~~](functions/isCoffee.md)                         | Type guard that validates whether an `unknown` value conforms to [CoffeeSchema](../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md). |
| [~~parseCoffeeJson~~](functions/parseCoffeeJson.md)           | Parses a JSON string and validates it as a single [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) entity.                  |
| [~~parseCoffeeArrayJson~~](functions/parseCoffeeArrayJson.md) | Parses a JSON string and validates it as an array of [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) entities.             |
